leadText: The Catching Charm (Japanese: ゆれないおまもり Unshakable Charm) is a Key Item introduced in Generation VIII. It increases the chance of a critical catch.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] The Catching Charm increases the chance of a critical catch occuring when throwing a Poké Ball at a wild Pokémon .

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description Sw Sh BD SP LA Holding it is said to increase the chance of getting a critical catch. Curiously, the charm doesn't shake much. S V Having one of these mysterious, unshakable charms makes it more likely you’ll get a critical catch.

sections.title: In the core series games
sections.text: Contents 1 In the core series games 1.1 Price 1.2 Effect 1.3 Description 1.4 Acquisition In the core series games [ edit | edit source ] Price [ edit | edit source ] Games Cost Sell price Sw Sh BD SP S V N/A N/A Effect [ edit | edit source ] The Catching Charm increases the chance of a critical catch occuring when throwing a Poké Ball at a wild Pokémon . Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description Sw Sh BD SP LA Holding it is said to increase the chance of getting a critical catch. Curiously, the charm doesn't shake much. S V Having one of these mysterious, unshakable charms makes it more likely you’ll get a critical catch. Acquisition [ edit | edit source ] Games Method Sw Sh Circhester (from the Game Freak director in the western building of Hotel Ionia) BD SP Hotel Grand Lake (from the Game Director in Game Freak's bungalow, after obtaining the National Pokédex ) S V ID League Club Room (from Drayton after donating 150 BP to Mitch )
